sub_modules.harris_sobel_3x3: Combinational Sobel gradient stencil for one 3x3 pixel window.
sub_modules.harris_gradient_products: Combinational computation of Ix squared, Iy squared, and IxIy gradient products.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian_3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing over the gradient product fields.
sub_modules.harris_response: Combinational fixed-point Harris response computation using determinant, trace, and k parameter.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Combinational binary corner decision against the configured response threshold.
